memoryArtifacts.headline: Affeton Manor / Castle, Worlington, Devonshire, England
memoryArtifacts.description:
Manor of Affeton
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

 "Affeton Castle", the gatehouse of the former manor house of Affeton, restored to a private residence in 1868-9.
 
Affeton is a former historic manor in Devon. It was at one time also a parish with its own parish church, but was later merged into the parish of West Worlington. The manor house was almost entirely demolished in the Civil War, the only part left standing was the gatehouse, which fell into ruin. A large farmhouse known as "Affeton Barton" was soon after built over the foundations and cellars of the manor house. The ruinous gatehouse was converted in 1868-9 to a shooting box for the use of the Stucley family of Hartland Abbey and Moreton House, Bideford, and became known thereafter as "Affeton Castle".

zh.Afton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文阿福頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Stuckley於1475年出生在英國英格蘭戴文阿福頓時，他的父親Nicholas Stucley11472歲，母親Thomasin Cockworthy24歲。他於大約1495年與Lady Anne Wood在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國戴文被列為lord of the manor。他去世於1542年1月30日在英國戴文享年67歲。

zh-hans.Afton, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文阿福頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Stuckley于1475年出生在英国英格兰戴文阿福頓时，他的父亲Nicholas Stucley11472岁，母亲Thomasin Cockworthy24岁。他于大约1495年与Lady Anne Wood在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国戴文被列为lord of the manor。他去世于1542年1月30日在英国戴文享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stuckley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Swiss German Stöckli or Stöckle, diminutives of Stock 2.

variants.name: Stokley
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Stockleigh or Stockley, including Stockley in Rolleston (Staffordshire), Stockley in Asthall (Oxfordshire), Stockleigh English and Stockleigh Pomeroy (Devon), and Stockley in Brancepeth (Durham); the placenames all derive from Old English stocc ‘tree trunk, stump’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variant of Stokesley, a habitational name from Stokesley (North Yorkshire). The placename appears to derive from Old English stoc ‘place, secondary settlement’ (genitive stoces) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Stuckley was born in 1475, in Afton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Stucley, was 11472 and his mother, Thomasin Cockworthy, was 24. He married Lady Anne Wood about 1495, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as lord of the manor in Devon, England. He died on 30 January 1542, in Devon, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Stuckley est né en 1475, à Afton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Stucley, avait 11472 ans et sa mère, Thomasin Cockworthy, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Wood environ 1495, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of the manor à Devon, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1542, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Stuckley 1475 in Afton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Stucley 11472 und seine Mutter Thomasin Cockworthy 24. Er hat um 1495 in Devon, England Lady Anne Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als lord of the manor in Devon, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. Januar 1542 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Stuckley è nato il nel 1475 nel Afton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas Stucley, aveva 11472 anni e il suo madre, Thomasin Cockworthy, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Wood circa 1495, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of the manor nel Devon, England. Morì il 30 gennaio 1542, nel Devon, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Stuckleyが1475年にイギリスイギリスデボンアフトンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Stucleyは11472歳，母Thomasin Cockworthyは24歳であった。約1495年にイギリスデボンでLady Anne Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスデボンでの職業はlord of the manorと記録されている。彼は1542年1月30日にイギリスデボンで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Stuckley(이)가 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 아프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Stucley(은)는 11472세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasin Cockworthy(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1495년 영국 데폰에서 Lady Anne Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 데폰에서 lord of the manor이었다. 그는 1542년 1월 30일 영국 데폰에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Afton, Devon, England: Afton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Stuckley nasceu em 1475, em Afton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas Stucley, tinha 11472 anos e sua mãe, Thomasin Cockworthy, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Wood aproximadamente 1495, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como lord of the manor em Devon, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1542, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Stuckley родился в 1475 г. в местности афтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Stucley было 11472 года, а матери, которую звали Thomasin Cockworthy, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Wood около 1495 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии lord of the manor в местности девон, Англия. Он умер 30 января 1542 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Stuckley nació en 1475, en Afton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas Stucley, tenía 11472 años y su mamá, Thomasin Cockworthy, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Wood aproximadamente 1495, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era lord of the manor en Devon, Inglaterra. Murió el 30 de enero de 1542, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
